title: stelis leptorhiza
intro: Stelis leptorhiza, also known as the butterfly orchid or Stelis orchid, is a type of orchid species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis leptorhiza include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Stelis leptorhiza can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
